personas.name: Mindful Maven
personas.description: A wellness enthusiast who regularly practices meditation and yoga
goals: to find a reliable meditation app that helps reduce stress and anxiety
pain_points: difficulty finding an app that meets her meditation needs
constraints: values ease of use and high-quality content

personas.name: Frustrated Fan
personas.description: A user who had issues with subscription and refund
goals: to get a refund for an unwanted subscription
pain_points: difficulty canceling subscription and getting a refund
context: signed up for a free trial and forgot to cancel
constraints: values ease of use and clear refund policies

personas.name: Tech-Savvy Tom
personas.description: A user who values app functionality and user experience
goals: to find an app with a user-friendly interface and seamless functionality
pain_points: difficulty navigating the app and finding desired features
context: regularly uses various apps for meditation and wellness
constraints: values ease of use and seamless functionality

personas.name: Disappointed Dave
personas.description: A user who had a negative experience with the app
goals: to find an app that meets his needs and provides value
pain_points: difficulty with app functionality and overall experience
context: tried the app but was disappointed with the paywall

personas.name: Troubled Tim
personas.description: A user who experienced technical issues and support problems
goals: to resolve technical issues and get support
pain_points: difficulty with app functionality and lack of support
context: experienced technical issues with the app
constraints: values reliable support and seamless functionality
